mentions.note: CEO Len Schleifer on show April 2005; early-stage biotech; $1,000 investment became $1,501,000+ by 2024; blockbuster macular degeneration drug; prime example of scalability.

Dupixent ($2B+, 8 indications, leader in 7); Eylea ($2B/year, dominant retinal therapy); Libtayo showing superiority vs. Keytruda; Proluent (50-60% LDL reduction) combo with obesity drug = game-changer; internal R&D model vastly superior to acquisitions.
Solid pharma name; useful for diversification away from magical thinking stocks.
Should have pulled trigger at JP Morgan conference; much better biotech bet than peers except Eli Lilly.
Caller Terry notes forward P/E 18–19, PEG 1.6, rising earnings, good pipeline. Cramer bullish: CEO Len Schleifer 'doing a number'; stock 'breaking out.' Held with Amgen in Charitable Trust.
